title: phebalium pungens
intro: Phebalium pungens, also known as the prickly-leaved phebalium, is a shrub native to eastern Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phebalium pungens include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. The plant is often prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
